items.title: Startup Founder Charlie Javice Sentenced to More Than 7 Years for Defrauding JPMorgan
items.description: The Frank founder acknowledged she “made mistakes,” but her attorneys say they plan to appeal her conviction.

items.title: Electronic Arts Is Going Private. Is It Too Late to Buy EA Stock Here?
items.description: EA stock is rallying today after the company agreed to be taken private in a $55 billion leveraged buyout. But is there any upside left in Electric Arts shares?

items.title: Cramer's Banking Bet: Why JPMorgan And Goldman Still Look Cheap
items.description: Jim Cramer just tossed another log on the bank-stock fire.

items.title: Qatar National Bank to Boost USD Payments with JPMorgan’s Blockchain
items.description: Qatar National Bank Group (QNB) recently adopted Kinexys, JPMorgan’s blockchain platform. According to a Bloomberg report, the goal is to process corporate digital payments in the region. More importantly, this latest development is a pivot from the pain points experienced by users of traditional banking infrastructures. QNB Departs from Limitations ...

items.title: Enlight Strengthens US Presence With New Financing Deals For Clean Energy Projects
items.description: Enlight Renewable Energy (NASDAQ: ENLT) said its U.S. subsidiary, Clēnera Holdings, has finalized two tax equity partnerships for the Roadrunner Solar and Energy Storage Project near Tucson, Arizona. J.P. Morgan Chase Bank (NYSE: JPM) will provide financing for the 290-megawatt solar portion, while M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) and First Citizens Bank (NASDAQ: FCNCA) are backing the 940-megawatt-hour storage facility.
